/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/UniverseSim.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/UniverseSim.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UniverseSim.dir/src/Universe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UniverseSim.dir/external/glad/src/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/UniverseSim.dir/external/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UniverseSim.dir/external/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UniverseSim.dir/external/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UniverseSim.dir/external/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UniverseSim.dir/external/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UniverseSim.dir/external/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o UniverseSim  /usr/lib64/libGL.so /usr/lib64/libglfw.so.3.4
